title: Blue Frogs
description: Adds Blue Frogs based on official concept art (resource pack only).
body:
_(Want real Frog variants? Check out [**Frog Concept Variants**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/frog-concept-variants)!)_ A pack and a poem
I now give to you
Roses are red
But the frogs are **blue**

Replaces the Warm Frog in some biomes with **Blue Frog** variants. Each of the five textures are based on Mojang's Blue Frog concept art. OptiFine or Entity Texture Features (ETF) is required for this pack to work as intended, but it can be used without.

## Features: ### With OptiFine or ETF: - Five variants of **Blue Frogs**. - Blue Frogs can be found in **Mangrove Swamps** or by naming a Warm Frog to "Blue Frog" (case insensitive) - Frogs in Lukewarm Oceans and Warm Oceans will also appear as Blue Frogs. ### Without OptiFine or ETF: - All Warm Frogs will be Blue Frog A.
## ### MintRefresh:
